l2_sentences: The detective entered the abandoned mansion, assuming the role of a curious historian.
Inside, she discovered a hidden chamber where a librarian was cataloging ancient texts, pretending to be a ghost.
The librarian, in turn, revealed a mirror that reflected not the room, but a different world where a traveler was waiting to be summoned.
The traveler stepped through the mirror, erasing the librarian from existence as they merged into a single entity.
With the traveler now fully present, the detective vanished, absorbed into the narrative of the world beyond the mirror.
